title: custom_css_path read failure is silently swallowed
description: In server.rs serve(), the custom CSS file is read with std::fs::read_to_string().unwrap_or_default(). If the operator specifies a custom_css_path in config.toml but the file doesn't exist or isn't readable (wrong permissions, typo, NFS mount not yet available), the server starts with no custom CSS and no error. The operator will not know their CSS was silently dropped unless they notice the visual change. Should return an error on startup to match the behavior of other misconfigured paths.
close_reason: Fixed: custom_css_path read failure now logs warning.
